description: Style NoteInspired from India's rich jewel history, this bangle from royal diadem is sure to become a love-forever statement piece in your jewellery box. Style this with matching ethnic suits or saris or wear it with a monochrome ensemble for an interesting fusion vibe. This piece is guaranteed to give your look an instant boho edge (if it's a Western outfit) or a refined polish (if paired with ethnic wear)Product Details Wide white stone encrusted braceletHas mango patterningMaterial and CareMetalWipe with a cotton swab to remove dustSizeWidth: 2 cmDiameter: 6.5 cm
